Class ToolResponseMessage

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.messages.AbstractMessage
org.springframework.ai.chat.messages.ToolResponseMessage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message, Content
public class ToolResponseMessage extends AbstractMessage
The ToolResponseMessage class represents a message with a function content in a chat application.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Eric Bottard
